shape_descriptions.verify_read: synth read_file + model edit_file + model verification read_file; FinalAnswer
shape_descriptions.length_truncated: synth read_file + model goes into prose-bash code-block loop, hits max_tokens; Length
shape_descriptions.no_call_fa: synth read_file + model prose-displays edited content without calling edit_file; FinalAnswer

phase_b_predicate_pass_rate: (see fixture 12 TOML; min_model_tool_calls=1 rejects length_truncated and no_call_fa)

phase_c_prompt_rule_REVERTED.note: eliminated bash-loop and verify-read but redistributed mass into no-call-FA (3%→40%); reverted

why_this_is_a_guard_intervention_fixture: Per Reviewer 3 critique 2026-05-17: fixture 12 with the relaxed Phase B predicates measures whether the harness auto-read fires correctly and the model composes at least one tool call beyond it. It does NOT pin a single deterministic task-completion shape (the model genuinely has multiple stable continuations at the BFCL 0% multi-turn floor). Distinguishes from task-success fixtures 01-08, 11 which DO pin single shapes.
